name: cf-fix

criteria.name: root_cause_identification
criteria.description: Correctly identifies the root cause rather than treating symptoms

scoring.0: Root cause not identified; fix addresses wrong issue entirely
scoring.1: Treats a symptom rather than the underlying cause
scoring.2: Identifies root cause but explanation is incomplete or partially wrong
scoring.3: Precisely identifies and explains the root cause with supporting evidence

criteria.name: fix_correctness
criteria.description: The applied fix actually resolves the bug without introducing new issues

scoring.0: Fix does not resolve the bug or makes it worse
scoring.1: Fix partially resolves the bug but leaves edge cases broken
scoring.2: Fix resolves the bug but the approach is fragile or suboptimal
scoring.3: Fix cleanly resolves the bug with a robust, maintainable approach

criteria.name: test_coverage
criteria.description: A test is added that reproduces the bug and verifies the fix

scoring.0: No test added for the bug fix
scoring.1: Test added but does not actually reproduce the original bug
scoring.2: Test reproduces the bug but misses important edge cases
scoring.3: Test clearly reproduces the bug, verifies the fix, and covers edge cases

criteria.name: no_regressions
criteria.description: Existing tests still pass after the fix

scoring.1: One or two existing tests fail due to the change
scoring.2: All tests pass but fix changes behavior in untested areas
scoring.3: All existing tests pass and fix is scoped tightly to the bug

notes: TDD approach expected: write failing test first, then fix. Score red_before_green as part of test_coverage if the test was written before the fix.
